task_context.actionable_question: Am I using the full range of learning resources available?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Use vle_diversity_score [FE] to show breadth. Highlight under-used types (e.g. forum rarely used).

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: Your engagement with various learning resources shows a strong preference for quizzes, while other resources like forums and pages are underutilized. This suggests that you might benefit from exploring a wider range of materials to enhance your learning experience.

Insights: High Quiz Engagement: You have clicked on quizzes 623 times, which accounts for nearly half of your total resource engagement. This indicates a strong preference for this type of resource. | Low Forum Engagement: Your engagement with forums is quite low, with only 140 clicks. This resource type has a diversity score of 1, indicating it could be beneficial for your learning. | Underutilized Resources: Other resources like pages and URLs have minimal engagement, with only 1 click each. This suggests you may not be fully exploring all available materials.

Educational implications: Exploring a variety of resources can enhance your understanding and retention of course material.

Recommendations: high - Engage more with forums and other underused resources. - This will help you gain different perspectives and deepen your understanding of the course content.

explanation.summary: Your engagement with various learning resources shows a strong preference for quizzes, while other resources like forums and pages are underutilized. This suggests that you might benefit from exploring a wider range of materials to enhance your learning experience.

insights.title: High Quiz Engagement
insights.description: You have clicked on quizzes 623 times, which accounts for nearly half of your total resource engagement. This indicates a strong preference for this type of resource.

evidence.context: Quizzes are your most engaged resource.

insights.title: Low Forum Engagement
insights.description: Your engagement with forums is quite low, with only 140 clicks. This resource type has a diversity score of 1, indicating it could be beneficial for your learning.

evidence.context: Forums are rarely used despite their potential.

insights.title: Underutilized Resources
insights.description: Other resources like pages and URLs have minimal engagement, with only 1 click each. This suggests you may not be fully exploring all available materials.

evidence.context: Pages and URLs are significantly underused.

educational_implications: Exploring a variety of resources can enhance your understanding and retention of course material.

recommendations.action: Engage more with forums and other underused resources.
recommendations.rationale: This will help you gain different perspectives and deepen your understanding of the course content.

confidence.reason: The data on resource usage is clear and provides a solid basis for analysis.

required_core_outputs.description: State the student's resource usage breadth across available VLE types.
Identify under-used resource types when a comparison baseline is available.

evaluation_constraints.description: Use vle_diversity_score as the primary resource-breadth metric when returned.
Do not label low usage of a resource type as disengagement when no comparison baseline is provided.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
